scripts.build-alt: cp -r src ../skipper/native && rm ../skipper/native/src/index.ts && tsc --outDir ../skipper/native/src && sed "s|-lskipruntime<!(echo \$VERSION)|-lskipruntime-skipper-$(node -p 'require("../skipper/native/package.json").version')|" binding.gyp > ../skipper/native/binding.gyp
scripts.clean: rm -rf dist tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && node-gyp clean && npm run clean-alt
